Cerebras — Deep Dive | Friday, April 17, 2026
Daily deep dive into Cerebras — covering Wafer-scale chip, CS-3, AI supercomputer, Inference, Condor Galaxy.
Latest News & Announcements
OpenAI News | Today's Latest Stories | Reuters — Reuters.com is your online source for the latest news stories and current events, ensuring our readers up to date with any breaking news developments source
OpenAI to spend more than $20 billion on Cerebras chips, receive stake, The Information reports — April 16 (Reuters) - OpenAI has agreed to pay chip startup Cerebras more than $20 billion over the next three years to use servers powered by the company's chips, under a deal that could also give the source
